description: The Create Undo Batch node Begins an undo batch, executes the Create call, then ends the undo batch all in one frame.

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Calls an impulse to create an undo batch.
fields.Description: The description for this undo batch. The description will be automatically prepended with "Undo" in bigger text in the context menu.
fields.Create: The impulse created when the undo batch is started but not ended.
fields.OnCreated: The impulse created after the undo batch is ended.
